app.name: NexShieldVeil
status.protected.headline: Protected
status.clear.headline: Clear
status.paused.headline: Paused
status.error.headline: Camera error
status.protected.detail: The veil is on: someone else's gaze is on your screen.
status.paused.detail: Watching is paused. Your screen is not being watched.
error.no_camera.detail: No camera found. Plug in a webcam to start watching.
error.disconnected.detail: The camera was disconnected. Watching is paused.
error.permission_denied.detail: NexShieldVeil cannot access the camera. Allow it in your system settings.
error.model_unavailable.detail: The detection model is missing. Watching cannot see any face.
onboarding.step1.title: NexShieldVeil draws a veil over your screen
onboarding.step1.body: It watches your webcam and, as soon as a face other than yours looks at your screen, covers the content with a veil — then lifts it once they look away.
onboarding.limits.title: What it does not protect against
onboarding.limits.body: It reduces the risk of shoulder surfing, it does not remove it. It cannot stop a camera filming the screen, an onlooker outside the webcam's view, reflections, or the brief moment before masking.
onboarding.step2.title: Camera access
onboarding.step2.body: Everything is processed locally, in memory. No image is saved or sent. NexShieldVeil recognises no one: it counts and locates faces, nothing more.
onboarding.step3.title: First settings
settings.title: Settings
settings.sensitivity.hint: To the right: masks even for off-axis glances. To the left: only when someone looks straight at the screen.
settings.release.hint: Always at least the masking delay, to prevent flicker.
about.title: About & limits
about.tagline: Reduces the risk of shoulder surfing, it does not remove it.
about.local: Everything is processed locally, in memory. No image is saved or sent.
about.limits.title: What NexShieldVeil does not protect against
about.limits.1: A camera or phone filming your screen.
about.limits.2: An onlooker outside the webcam's view.
about.limits.3: The brief moment before the veil settles.
about.limits.5: A long-range zoom lens, from a distance.
